Malaysia Tennis Tournaments 2026

The full TennisMalaysia 2026 calendar — 51 events across the national circuit, junior tour, ITF, ATF and international team competition.

Below is the complete 2026 tournament list. Use the filters to show confirmed events, events still to be confirmed (TBC), or completed events. Status and dates follow the official TennisMalaysia summary.

Confirmed 21 · TBC 8 · Completed 22

Status
TennisMalaysia 2026 calendar — 51 events
Organizer Tournament Category Venue Date (2026) Status

Organizer badges are derived from the event name as a colour-coded label (not official logos). Real organiser logo files can be dropped in later.

Source: TennisMalaysia "Calendar of Events 2026" summary (updated 29 May 2026). Venue "TBC" means the source did not list a venue. Dates and statuses can change — confirm with the organiser before travelling. "Category" is our own classification to aid filtering, not part of the source data.
